children.heading: Under Secretary of Commerce for Industry and Security
children.label: a Under Secretary of Commerce for Industry and Security

children.text: all functions of the Secretary under this chapter; and
all functions delegated to the Under Secretary of Commerce for Export Administration on the day before the date of the enactment of this Act.

children.heading: Reference
children.label: b Reference
children.text: On and after , any reference in any law or regulation to the Under Secretary of Commerce for Export Administration shall be deemed to be a reference to the Under Secretary of Commerce for Industry and Security.August 13, 2018

children.heading: Continuation in office
children.label: d Continuation in office
children.text: The individual serving as Under Secretary of Commerce for Export Administration on the day before , may serve as the Under Secretary of Commerce for Industry and Security on and after that date without the need for renomination or reappointment.August 13, 2018
